overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at dusk. The character travels from a quieter street into a bustling downtown area with towering megabuildings, holographic advertisements, and palm-lined boulevards.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban approach street with power lines and holographic signage

events.description: character turns right at the intersection to proceed down a curved road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the street toward the downtown megabuildings, then turning right at the intersection

entered.detail: tall twin-tower megabuilding with illuminated H10 signage visible in the distance
glowing green rectangular holographic advertisement mounted on a pole
low-rise building with distinctive red roof and antenna structure
crisscrossing electrical wires spanning the street between poles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a city street at dusk with the camera following a character walking toward the illuminated downtown skyline. A massive megabuilding looms in the distance while a green holographic sign glows on the right. The character approaches an intersection and turns right onto a curved road.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved commercial street with billboards and distant towers

events.description: a dark van with headlights on passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing down the curved road after the turn, maintaining a steady pace along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: van driving past the camera with headlights illuminated at dusk

entered.detail: distinctive cylindrical building with a tall spire antenna and illuminated windows
large colorful digital advertisement screen showing animated content
tall palm trees lining the distant right side of the street

segments.scene_description: After turning right, the character proceeds along a curved road that opens up to reveal more of the city skyline. The megabuilding shifts to the left while a distinctive circular tower with a spire becomes visible ahead. A van passes by on the right, and colorful digital billboards line the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza area with prominent tower landmark

agents.ego_description: walking toward the circular tower structure while passing other pedestrians on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the broad avenue approaching the distinctive circular tower building that dominates the center of the view. Palm trees become more numerous along both sides of the street, and the pedestrian density increases slightly as the area becomes more commercial.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined urban street with traditional architecture and shops

events.description: entering a denser palm-tree lined street with traditional Japanese-style buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing groups of pedestrians and street vendors

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: traditional wooden building with overhanging roof and dense hedge in front, lit from within

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a palm-tree lined boulevard with a mix of traditional and modern architecture. The circular tower recedes into the background on the right while a traditional Japanese-style building with a hedge becomes prominent on the left. More pedestrians populate the sidewalks, creating a lively evening atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet city street at dusk into a bustling, neon-lit commercial district. It begins by following a character walking toward a distant, looming megabuilding and a glowing green holographic sign before turning right onto a curved road. As the camera proceeds, the skyline expands to reveal a distinctive circular tower with a spire, while colorful digital billboards and passing traffic heighten the urban energy. The scene then opens into a broad avenue where palm trees become more numerous and pedestrian density increases as the character approaches the central tower. Finally, the view shifts toward a palm-lined boulevard where the tower recedes to the right, giving way to a traditional Japanese-style building and a lively evening crowd on the sidewalks.
